---
title: "Spark_h&f"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| label: load-data

plus_hf_merged <- readRDS("03_explore_tasks/Spark_lab_hf_data/plus_hf_merged.rds")
kimochis_hf <- readRDS("03_explore_tasks/Spark_lab_hf_data/kimochis_hf.rds")

colnames(plus_hf_merged)
colnames(kimochis_hf)

View(plus_hf_merged)
View(kimochis_hf)

```

```{r}
#| label: explore-data

head(plus_hf_merged, 3)
head(kimochis_hf, 3)

unique(plus_hf_merged$block)
unique(plus_hf_merged$stim_shape)

unique(kimochis_hf$block)
unique(kimochis_hf$stim_shape)

colnames(plus_hf_merged)

```

```{r}
# checking scoring
library(dplyr)
plus_hf_merged %>%
  filter(block == "flowers test") %>%
  summarise(mean_acc = mean(acc, na.rm = TRUE))
mean(plus_hf_merged$acc, na.rm = TRUE)
mean(kimochis_hf$acc[kimochis_hf$block == "flowers test"], na.rm = TRUE)


```

```{r}
```
